大发导师一对一单带计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239149317_65945369<br>vk.com/topic-239142235_64417741<br>vk.com/topic-239137592_65110199<br>vk.com/topic-239149248_65014821<br>vk.com/topic-239153619_65292213<br>vk.com/topic-239142208_65014822<br>vk.com/topic-239092202_65110201<br>vk.com/topic-239149192_65110205<br>vk.com/topic-239183330_65567303<br>vk.com/topic-239183300_65567302<br>vk.com/topic-239183421_66162992<br>vk.com/topic-239218417_65945370<br>vk.com/topic-239183467_65945371<br>vk.com/topic-239149141_66162994<br>vk.com/topic-239153639_65292216<br>vk.com/topic-239142232_65110211<br>vk.com/topic-239170359_65292220<br>vk.com/topic-239218404_64503670<br>vk.com/topic-239218447_65945384<br>vk.com/topic-239183315_64417751<br>vk.com/topic-239218495_64417754<br>vk.com/topic-239183360_65567313<br>vk.com/topic-239149137_65945388<br>vk.com/topic-239120251_66162998<br>vk.com/topic-239142178_65014833<br>vk.com/topic-239182932_65110218<br>vk.com/topic-239183510_65567318<br>vk.com/topic-239183291_66163001<br>vk.com/topic-239137592_65110221<br>vk.com/topic-239218422_65110160<br>vk.com/topic-239142235_64417762<br>vk.com/topic-239183515_64417764<br>vk.com/topic-239136431_66163003<br>vk.com/t
